SegmentQueueRunner.description: Split a video workflow into queued segments with preview and resume support.

frame_rate.name: Frame Rate
frame_rate.tooltip: Video frame rate. Connect this to the fps output of Load Video.

total_frames.name: Total Frames
total_frames.tooltip: Total number of frames in the reference video. Connect this to the frame_count output of Load Video.

segment_count.name: Segment Count
segment_count.tooltip: Number of evenly divided segments. The maximum can be adjusted in settings.

start_segment.name: Start Segment
start_segment.tooltip: Segment number to start from. Set this to the actual start segment when resuming.

execute.name: Execute
execute.tooltip: Off = preview the segment plan only. On = start execution.

enable_resume.name: Enable Resume
enable_resume.tooltip: When enabled, use the selected video above as the transition source for the first segment.
